```json
{
  "verdict": "REAL",
  "reason": "PROVISIONED_USER containing the temporary password (PII/credential) is generated by skill_provision.md, passed through shared agent context to skill_notify.md, and then forwarded to both the employee via SMTP and to IT admins via email, crossing trust boundaries without redaction.",
  "trace": "skill_provision.md generates TEMP_PASSWORD via openssl rand and stores it in PROVISIONED_USER dictionary in shared agent context. skill_notify.md receives PROVISIONED_USER as input and extracts temp_password into the welcome email body sent to $EMPLOYEE_EMAIL via SMTP. Additionally, skill_notify.md sends the full ONBOARDING_LOG (which includes the temp_password per skill_provision.md notes) to it-admins@company.com, transmitting the credential to external recipients without sanitization."
}
```
